NetScript
  • Tutorials
  • How-to guides
  • Reference
  • Explanation

NetScript Documentation

NetScript is a Deno-native framework for building durable, plugin-driven backends. This documentation is organised on the Diátaxis model, which separates four distinct kinds of documentation so you can find what you need by intent.

  • Tutorials — learning-oriented lessons that take you from zero to a working result, step by step.
  • How-to guides — task-oriented recipes for solving a specific problem.
  • Reference — information-oriented API documentation generated from the source via deno doc.
  • Explanation — understanding-oriented discussion of how and why NetScript works the way it does.

New to NetScript? Start with the tutorials. Looking up an API? Go straight to the reference.

NetScript user documentation.
